checks.name: target_subject_count

checks.name: target_finite_t1

checks.detail: Item 9 target values must stay within UPDRS item range 0-4.

checks.detail: Item 9 JSON CCC must match summary JSON and CSV lockbox records.

checks.name: item_9_recomputed_metric_near_seed_mean
checks.detail: Item 9 recomputed CCC from averaged OOF should be near the reported mean-of-seed CCC; this is a warning because the historical JSON stores mean-of-seed metrics while the OOF stores averaged predictions.

checks.name: all_six_item_oofs_loaded
checks.detail: All six expected T1 item OOF arrays must load successfully.

checks.name: summed_oof_equals_stored_composite_oof
checks.detail: Summing the six item OOF arrays must exactly reproduce the stored T1 composite OOF.

checks.name: recomputed_composite_metric_matches_json
checks.detail: Recomputed composite metrics must match the stored canonical T1 iter12 JSON.

checks.name: recomputed_composite_metric_matches_canonical_expected
checks.detail: Recomputed composite metrics must match the canonical AGENTS.md / CLAUDE.md T1 iter12 numbers.

checks.name: single_coherent_iter8_batch
checks.detail: Composite preregistration must use only one timestamped iter8 batch.

interpretation: PASS means the canonical T1 iter12 composite is exactly reproducible from six fixed per-item OOF arrays in the single iter8 batch 20260430_143044. It does not upgrade the metric; it confirms coherent provenance for the current honest T1 floor.
